title: desmodium gyrans var. roylei
intro: Desmodium gyrans var. roylei, also known as Indian ironweed or Royle's desmodium, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, as well as possessing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Desmodium gyrans var. roylei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the form of capsules, tablets, or topical creams.
